pages.title: Honey N Venom (Rude Wine Riddim)
pages.tagline: Sweet allure meets lethal heat in this peak-time bashment ba

pages.body: Step into the sweaty grip of a club where desire burns hotter than strobe lights. This anthem blends sultry female toasting with raw male vocals, weaving a narrative of lovers who are as deadly as they are delicious. Feel the chest-rattling 808s shake your floor and let rapid-fire call-and-response patterns build an intoxicating tension. It is not merely music; it is a sensory overload that captures the gritty energy of Dancehall culture at its most electric. Embrace the dangerous attraction, lose control in the drop, and ride out the chaos where heaven looks like hell.
pages.styleSentence: A peak-time club anthem driven by a sharp Afro-Caribbean riddim at high tempo featuring chest-rattling overdriven 808s, siren FX, and rapid-fire call-and-response toasting between a sultry female lead and raw male vocals.

pages.text:
[Intro - Female, Sultry]

Mm-mm...
You look sweet from far away...
Till you get a taste...

[Drop]

Honey n venom...
Honey n venom...

[Chorus - Female]

Honey n venom, baby that's your style
Kiss me deep while you grind for a while
Honey n venom, got me losing my head
Both hands on my waist, got me wild in your bed

Honey n venom, pressing in the strobe light
Heart says more while my dress riding up high
Honey n venom, everybody can tell
You look like heaven but we f**king like hell

[Post-Chorus]

Ay-ay-ay-ay
Honey n venom
Ay-ay-ay-ay
Honey n venom

[Verse 1 - Male Toasting]

She walk in slow motion
Whole room freeze up
Gold in the smile
But the lips say "deeper"

Body got rhythm
Skin like silk
Sweet when she whining on the waistline milk

But mi know
Fire burning in the sugar
Pretty little waist
Turn a king to a lover

One minute halo
Next minute torn
Everybody know she wicked
Still everybody swarm

[Pre-Chorus - Female]

I know...
I know...
But I still come close

I know...
I know...
Still dancing with ghosts

[Chorus - Female]

Honey n venom, baby that's your style
Kiss me deep while you grind for a while
Honey n venom, got me losing my head
Both hands on my waist, got me wild in your bed

Honey n venom, pressing in the strobe light
Heart says more while my dress riding up high
Honey n venom, everybody can tell
You look like heaven but we f**king like hell

[Dancehall Breakdown]

Wine slow...
Don't stop...
Hands high...
Bass drop...

Wine low...
Tick-tock...
Honey n venom...
Bass knock...

[Verse 2 - Male & Female Back-and-Forth]

(Male)
You got the sugar

(Female)
You want the taste

(Male)
Bend pon the speaker

(Female)
Hands on my waist

(Male)
One more whine

(Female)
One more night

(Both)
Then we do it in the dark and the neon light

(Male)
Grab pon the bumper

(Female)
Grip on the thigh

(Male)
Why you always make me misbehave?

(Female)
'Cause you love when I ride

(Male)
Dangerous gyal

(Female)
Dangerous boy

(Male)
Why you always playing with fire?

(Female)
Because the burn feels good

[Big Chorus - Female Lead + Crowd]

Honey n venom, baby that's your style
Whole dancehall shouting every dirty line
Honey n venom, hands up to the sky
If loving you is wrong then I still wanna try

Honey n venom, rhythm in my veins
Everybody sweating in the tropical rain
Honey n venom, one more time before dawn
Sweet little poison got the whole world on

[Outro]

Ay-ay-ay-ay...
Honey n venom...

Ay-ay-ay-ay...
Honey n venom...

Sweet like honey...
Sharp like danger...

Honey...
N venom...

pages.vocalStyle: Aggressive, teasing, explicit delivery with rapid back-and-forth rap-singing

members.name: LEAD VOX
members.bio: Sultry lead voice teasing your soul with rapid-fire delivery.

members.name: BACKING VOX
members.bio: Raw male power backing her up in chaotic unison.

members.name: DRUMS
members.bio: Sharp riddim keeps the floor shaking without ever missing a beat.

members.name: PERCUSSION
members.bio: Explosive rhythms add texture to every sweaty dance step.

members.name: BASS
members.bio: Overdriven low-end rattles your chest like a dangerous lover.

members.name: SYNTH
members.bio: Cuts through the noise with siren FX and sharp melody lines.

members.name: TEXTURES
members.bio: Gritty layers create an atmosphere of intoxicating sensory overload.
